subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned unto and attained unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, and hath faced towards the Dayspring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل و فاز الی الله المهیمن القیوم و اقبل الی مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
